_source.methodology: Two-tier extraction. Tier 1 (Office, Warehouse): the original 'WholeBuilding aggregate' or documented area-weighted-mix values are preserved. Tier 2 (all other building_types): area-weighted whole-building people-per-1000-ft^2 computed by walking each prototype OSM (ASHRAE*.osm), summing OS:Space floorArea per OS:SpaceType, multiplying by that space type's occupancy_per_area from ashrae_90_1_2013.spc_typ.json, and dividing total people by total floor area. Replaces the v1 peak-load-space-density approximation that caused gross over-prediction when applied to total building floor area (e.g. Courthouse used 70.0 per 1000ft^2 from Courtroom; corrected to 18.19 per 1000ft^2 building average).

Warehouse.method: area-weighted across prototype DOE warehouse space ratios (70/20/10)

Retail.method: primary sales floor; back-of-house spaces typically <2 per 1000ft^2 [NOT YET REGENERATED]

SuperMarket.method: area-weighted across all OS:Spaces in prototype OSM (total_area=45002ft^2, total_people=385.1, unmatched_area=0.0%)

QuickServiceRestaurant.method: area-weighted across all OS:Spaces in prototype OSM (total_area=5002ft^2, total_people=93.8, unmatched_area=50.0%)
